who: compliance officers in accounting firms processing 5–15 financial reports/month
offer: For compliance officers in accounting firms processing 5–15 financial reports/month, manual reporting causes delays in compliance submissions. We automate the collection, formatting, and filing of reports instead of manual reporting processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual collection and formatting of financial reports is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for compliance officers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to compliance officers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for compliance tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly dashboard for report tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for deadlines
Allow CSV import for existing financial data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps required during onboarding process
